payload.jqExpression: if type == "object" and has("config") then {name: (.name // "{{.id}}"), description: (.description // (.config["project.description"] // "")), config: (.config + {"project.name": (.name // "{{.id}}") } + (if has("description") and (.description | type == "string") then {"project.description": .description} else {} end))} else {name: "{{.id}}", description: (."project.description" // ""), config: (. + {"project.name": (."project.name" // "{{.id}}")})} end
